---
title: "Certifications"
description: "My verified credentials and Google Analytics training."
---

## Google Analytics Certifications

::: {style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(300px, 1fr)); gap: 2rem; margin-top: 2rem; margin-bottom: 4rem;"}

::: {style="border: 1px solid #ddd; padding: 20px; border-radius: 8px; text-align: center; background: #fff;"}
![Get started using Google Analytics](assets/img/certs/Google Analytics.jpeg){style="max-width: 100%; height: auto; border-radius: 4px; margin-bottom: 1rem;"}

### Get started using Google Analytics
**Issuer:** Google  
**Date of Completion:** February 15, 2026  
**Certificate ID:** `57183 174479642`
:::

::: {style="border: 1px solid #ddd; padding: 20px; border-radius: 8px; text-align: center; background: #fff;"}
![Manage GA4 Data and Learn to Read Reports](assets/img/certs/Manage Ga4 Data and Read Reports.jpeg){style="max-width: 100%; height: auto; border-radius: 4px; margin-bottom: 1rem;"}

### Manage GA4 Data and Learn to Read Reports
**Issuer:** Google  
**Date of Completion:** February 20, 2026  
**Certificate ID:** `57183 174976146`
:::

::: {style="border: 1px solid #ddd; padding: 20px; border-radius: 8px; text-align: center; background: #fff;"}
![Dive Deeper into GA4 Data and Reports](assets/img/certs/Ga4 data and Reports.jpeg){style="max-width: 100%; height: auto; border-radius: 4px; margin-bottom: 1rem;"}

### Dive Deeper into GA4 Data and Reports
**Issuer:** Google  
**Date of Completion:** February 27, 2026  
**Certificate ID:** `57183 175740613`
:::

::: {style="border: 1px solid #ddd; padding: 20px; border-radius: 8px; text-align: center; background: #fff;"}
![Use GA4 with other Tools and Data Sources](assets/img/certs/Tools and Data sources.jpeg){style="max-width: 100%; height: auto; border-radius: 4px; margin-bottom: 1rem;"}

### Use GA4 with other Tools and Data Sources
**Issuer:** Google  
**Date of Completion:** March 7, 2026  
**Certificate ID:** `57183 176334035`
:::

:::
